title: Second Nature Pop Up Greeting Card for a 60th Birthday Card
features: This unique, elasticated 3D card automatically jumps to life when removed from its envelope
This card is truly collectable and will be treasured for years
It can be kept flat and opened when required recreating the memorable occasion
Write your message in the panel provided and place in the envelope for mailing
description: From the manufacturer Second Nature Pop Ups - 60th Birthday SELF SPRUNG: Pop Up greeting cards jump to life when removed from its envelope supplied. This 3D elasticised paper mechanism creates a true “pop up” as well as unique paper sculpture! Refolds easily to fit into its envelope. YOUR MESSAGE : A blank panel on the base of the card as well as the gift tag attached can be used for a personal message..To write your message easily you need to close the Pop-Up flat. COLLECTABLE : A wonderful personal gift of sentiment to treasure, these sculptures can be kept flat for mailing in their provided envelope, or stored, as KEEPSAKES. Celebrate the magic of a special occasions and relationships now, and help keep the memory forever! OTHER USES : These Pop Up cards can also be used as centrepieces, in floral arrangements or as a balloon accessory weight. INTERESTING FACTS : Did you know that this greeting card has over 50 folds and cuts. Hand folded ,it is all held together with one elastic band! The cards have been used on TV shows most recently GLEE! About us As a company we specialise in unusual greeting cards with innovation and imagination. Second Nature is located in the trendy Notting Hill area of London, England and has been in business for some 30 years.We are a small team of innovative designers with experienced teams operating production and distribution facilities and are committed to producing high quality products. We hope you enjoy sending or receiving these wonderful Pop Ups, a keepsake for years to come!
